artPrompt: A lone clerk's hand rises mid-gesture in a hushed beige chamber, an upraised palm halting a swirling cyan spell that freezes into drifting motes, faint arcane glow rippling off a stack of blank smudged papers, towering filing cabinets fading into hazy ivory shadow, the moment suspended in oppressive quiet, a tender melancholy in the diffuse light, rendered as soft pastel impressionism — hazy diffuse light, visible chalky texture, gentle gradients, dreamy muted color.
name: File an Objection
text: Counter target spell unless its controller pays {3}. ("Objection!" "On what grounds?" "Procedural.")
flavorText: Sustained. Overruled. Filed. Lost. Refiled. Sustained again, just to be safe.
